     The Numbers Business Report

The Green Knight (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,173,321Details
International Box Office $2,849,170
Worldwide Box Office $20,022,491
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,023,246
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,327,904
Total $3,351,150
Further financial details...

Synopsis

An epic fantasy adventure based on the timeless Arthurian legend, The Green Knight tells the story of Sir Gawain, King Arthur’s reckless and headstrong nephew, who embarks on a daring quest to confront the eponymous Green Knight, a gigantic emerald-skinned stranger and tester of men. Gawain contends with ghosts, giants, thieves, and schemers in what becomes a deeper journey to define his character and prove his worth in the eyes of his family and kingdom by facing the ultimate challenger.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,745,121 (39.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.55 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:85.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,790 opening theaters/2,798 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $20,195,955

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 30th, 2021 (Wide) by A24
December 11th, 2024 (IMAX) by A24
International Releases: July 30th, 2021 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
August 5th, 2021 (Wide) (South Korea)
August 6th, 2021 (Wide) (Netherlands)
August 6th, 2021 (Wide), released as Yeşil Şövalye (Turkey)
August 20th, 2021 (Wide), released as Žaliasis riteris (Lithuania)
Video Release: August 19th, 2021 by A24
MPA Rating: R for violence, some sexuality and graphic nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2654 (cert #52678), 11/4/2020)
Running Time: 125 minutes
Plot point: Giants, Haunting
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Heroic Adventure
Time period setting: Medieval
Source:Based on Folk Tale/Legend/Fairytale
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: A24, Bron Studios, Ley Line, Wild Atlantic Pictures, Sailor Bear
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

An epic fantasy adventure based on the timeless Arthurian legend, The Green Knight tells the story of Sir Gawain, King Arthur’s reckless and headstrong nephew, who embarks on a daring quest to confront the eponymous Green Knight, a gigantic emerald-skinned stranger and tester of men. Gawain contends with ghosts, giants, thieves, and schemers in what becomes a deeper journey to define his character and prove his worth in the eyes of his family and kingdom by facing the ultimate challenger.
